analysis: The project appears to be a static website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs). The current theme is likely dark/cosmic based on the existing CSS files, but needs enhancement to fully capture the black hole theme with animated elements, slides, and interactive pages. The existing To-Dos indicate incomplete CSS animations, JavaScript functionality, and HTML content related to black holes.

improvements.description: Enhance the dark, cosmic theme with black hole animations including swirling effects, glowing accretion disks, and pulsating event horizons. Add CSS animations for gravitational lensing effects and warping space-time visuals.

Complete the HTML structure to include interactive black hole sections, animated slides showing different types of black holes, and educational content about black hole formation, properties, and effects.

Implement smooth slide transitions for the animated black hole presentation, add interactive elements that respond to user actions (hover effects on black holes, click to reveal information), and ensure all event listeners are properly attached.

Add CSS variables for black hole colors (deep purples, blues, and blacks with glowing accents) and create reusable animation classes for spinning accretion disks, event horizon pulses, and gravitational wave ripples.
Include a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon and ensure responsive design for all black hole themed sections, maintaining usability across devices.
